creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your contribution.  Please would you have a look at the Documentation Primer [1], to see how to make docs changes?  It's very difficult for me to work out what you've changed and what's the same.

If you rework it to a diff I'll be able to comment on it-- please send in a new PR if you choose to do this.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/
